news.headline: Subaru and Gifts for Good partner in national program to support nonprofit causes, channeling customer incentives.
news.summary: A groundbreaking collaboration has been unveiled between Subaru of America, Inc. and Gifts for Good®, aimed at directing customer incentives towards impactful social and environmental organizations. This national program, announced on March 28, 2025 in Camden, N.J., marks a pioneering initiative in the realm of corporate social responsibility. The partnership seeks to harness the power of consumer incentives to drive support towards organizations making a real difference in communities. By leveraging this unique alliance, both entities are poised to make a significant impact, with far-reaching implications for social and environmental causes across the country.

news.headline: Stolt-Nielsen Limited to present first quarter 2025 results in virtual conference on April 3 at 15:00 CEST.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Stolt-Nielsen Limited (Oslo Børs: SNI) announced they will be conducting a virtual presentation to talk about the Company's unaudited performance for Q1 2025. This presentation is scheduled for Thursday, April 3, 2025, at 15:00 CEST (09:00 EDT, 14:00 BST).

news.headline: Law firm Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims on behalf of investors of Pliant Therapeutics. Encouraging those who suffered significant losses to contact Securities Litigation Partner James Wilson to discuss their options.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced substantial losses in Pliant Therapeutics to reach out to him. If you have suffered significant losses in Pliant Therapeutics stock or options, contact him directly to explore your potential options.

news.headline: ADM reported 22.4 million passengers in 2024 at YUL Airport, up 5.8% from 2023. EBITDA was $439.1 million, revenue $917.2 million, and net income $182.0 million. Operating expenses were $331.3 million, with transfers to govt of $146.8 million. Net debt was $2.21 billion.
news.summary: In 2024, ADM Aéroports de Montréal reported positive results and growth in key areas. YUL Montréal-Trudeau International Airport saw 5.1 million passengers in the fourth quarter, up 2.4% from 2023, and 22.4 million passengers in total, a 5.8% increase. EBITDA for 2024 was $439.1 million, up $1.2 million from the previous year. Capital investments were $456.5 million, up 39.6% from 2023. Consolidated revenues reached $917.2 million, an 8.2% increase. Net income was $182.0 million, up 36.9% from 2023. ADM's net debt as of December 31, 2024, was $2.21 billion. The company is focused on enhancing passenger experience with the Flight Plan 2028 initiative, starting construction this summer.

news.headline: Crypto Content Creator Campus to launch pilot edition in Bali from April 10-13, 2025, sponsored by Bybit, marking CCCC's debut in Asia Pacific.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on March 28, 2025, the Crypto Content Creator Campus (CCCC) announced the upcoming launch of a pilot edition in Bali from April 10 to 13, 2025. Sponsored by Bybit, the event will be CCCC's first in Asia Pacific and focus on the theme "Build Crypto."

news.headline: Holland America Line to start Alaska season on April 26, 6 ships to explore until Sept 2025. Exciting itinerary awaits.
news.summary: Alaska is prepared for the start of its cruise season as the first ship is set to depart on April 26. From this date through September 2025, a total of six ships will be exploring the beauty of Alaska through cruises and Cruisetours. Leading the way is Holland America Line, renowned for its Alaska cruising experiences. The season launch on April 26 marks the beginning of an exciting adventure as these six ships embark on journeys to explore the wonders of Alaska.

news.headline: Inventor from Perthamboy, N.J. creates E Z Lint Removal Device (NJD-2269) for laundry care, effectively removes lint and pet hair.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 28, 2025, an inventor from Perthamboy, New Jersey, shared their inspiration for creating a new laundry care appliance called the E Z LINT REMOVAL. The inventor aimed to develop a product that could efficiently eliminate lint, pet hair, and other debris from clothing. Their innovative design has shown promise in delivering improved results and is set to revolutionize the laundry care industry.

news.headline: Reply and AWS collaborate on Generative AI, aiming to enhance innovation and scalable AI apps. PRNewswire, March 28, 2025.
news.summary: A recent partnership aims to advance Generative AI solutions in various sectors by combining Reply's AI proficiency with AWS services. The collaboration was unveiled in Chicago on March 28, 2025. Reply, known for its expertise in systems integration and consulting, is a key player in this initiative.

news.headline: Alkami research finds banks need better fraud prevention; consumers prioritize data protection in digital banking.
news.summary: Research indicates that banks and credit unions must improve their prevention tactics as consumers demand better data security in their online banking services. This advice comes after a recent study conducted in Plano, Texas on March 28, 2025. Alkami Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALKT), a reputable provider of cloud-based digital banking solutions, highlights the urgency of this issue in light of increasing cyber threats.

news.headline: American Idol Season 22 Runner-Up Will Moseley releases new single "Mechanic" today; song about love power.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee on March 28, 2025, Will Moseley, the Runner-Up of American Idol Season 22, unveiled his latest track "Mechanic" under the label 19 Recordings / 19 Entertainment. This heartfelt song, co-written by Moseley along with Kaylin Robinson and Jaron, explores the theme of a woman's love mending a broken man.

news.headline: FallTech introduces FT-R+: First field-repairable Class 2 SRL with SpeedLine™ system, a breakthrough in fall protection.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, FallTech, a top provider of cutting-edge fall protection solutions, revealed the release of the FT-R+, a significant leap forward in self-retracting lifeline (SRL) technology. The FT-R+ introduces the innovative SpeedLine™ system, setting it apart from the rest in the industry.

Family files $50M lawsuit against Robinson Helicopter Company following death of former CEO and son in Quebec crash. Pl claim 'unacceptable negligence'.
news.summary: The executor of former Savoura CEO Stéphane Roy's estate, Daniel Roy, has revealed the filing of a $50 million lawsuit against Robinson Helicopter Company, Inc. The lawsuit stems from a fatal helicopter accident and allegedly points to "unacceptable negligence" on the part of the company. The plaintiffs are seeking compensation for the damages caused by the incident.

news.headline: Harvard Kennedy School case study highlights Target ALS and Dan Doctoroff's impactful approach to collaborative medical research.
news.summary: Renowned New York-based leader and former Deputy Mayor, Dan Doctoroff, is being acknowledged for his effective strategy in addressing ALS. The Harvard Kennedy School is set to debut a case study titled "Dan Doctoroff and the Power of Collaboration," highlighting his impactful approach. This recognition comes as Doctoroff's innovative methods have shown promising results in the field. The premiere of the case study will take place on March 28, 2025.

news.headline: Birkenstock opens new concept store in historic Zhangyuan, Shanghai on March 27th, marking a new chapter.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in Linz am Rhein, Germany and Shanghai, a well-known German footwear brand, BIRKENSTOCK, revealed its Zhangyuan Concept Store to the public. This store, initially launched as a pop-up, has now become a permanent establishment in one of the cities. BIRKENSTOCK, famous for creating the footbed, has taken this step to further solidify its presence and cater to its customers in the region.

news.headline: First Industrial Realty Trust (NYSE: FR) to host Q1 2025 results conference call on April 17 at 10:00am CDT.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, First Industrial Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: FR), a prominent logistics real estate owner, operator, and developer, announced they will conduct their first quarter 2025 results conference call on April 17, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. CDT. The call is scheduled for an hour with the possibility of an extension. This event is anticipated to provide valuable insights into the company's performance and financial outcomes for the specified period, attracting significant interest from investors, analysts, and stakeholders.

news.headline: WealthManagement.com released 2025 RIA Edge 100 list recognizing top RIA firms; highlighting those growing strategically.
news.summary: Announced today by WealthManagement.com, the 2025 RIA Edge 100 list recognizes the top registered investment advisory (RIA) firms in the industry. As the premier digital resource for financial advisors and wealth management professionals, WealthManagement.com celebrates the achievements of these firms on an annual basis. This year's list showcases the top performing RIAs that have excelled in various aspects of financial advisory services.

news.headline: March 28, 2025: TR-1 form notifies major holdings in Reykjavík company.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Reykjavík, a report under TR-1 regulation was issued regarding the disclosure of significant holdings. The TR-1 form is the standard notification for declaring large ownership stakes in a company. This regulatory announcement indicates that a shareholder or entity holds a significant portion of shares in a particular company. It is a key disclosure document that provides information on major ownership positions, as required by regulations. This notice is vital for investors and regulatory authorities to track changes in ownership and shareholder influence within companies.

news.headline: Minerals Technologies Inc. will report Q1 2025 results on April 24 after market close, with a conference call on April 25 at 11am ET.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Minerals Technologies Inc. (NYSE: MTX) revealed plans to report its Q1 results ending March 30, 2025, on April 24, 2025, after markets close. The company will conduct a conference call on April 25, 2025, at 11 a.m. ET to review these findings.

news.headline: Siem Investments merges into Momentum, holds 43,327,467 shares (33.08%); new significant shareholder in EMGS.
news.summary: The merger of Siem Investments S.à r.l., which owned 43,327,467 shares in Electromagnetic Geoservices ASA, representing 33.08% of shares and votes, occurred on 28 March 2025 when it was integrated into Momentum S.à r.l.

Colony Grill is the official pizza partner of Tampa Bay Rays for 2025-2028, serving thin-crust pizza at George M. Steinbrenner Field.
news.summary: In Tampa, starting March 28, 2025, baseball enthusiasts will have the opportunity to savor Colony Grill's renowned thin-crust pizza on game days as part of a fresh four-year collaboration. The partnership designates Colony Grill as the Official Pizza of the Tampa Bay Rays. The delectable pizza will be available at George M. Steinbrenner Field during the specified period.

news.headline: FDA approves first home test for Chlamydia, Gonorrhea, and Trichomoniasis. Opens 510(k) pathway for STI home tests.
news.summary: In a significant development, Visby Medical has been granted marketing authorization by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration in Silver Spring, Maryland on March 28, 2025. This approval not only paves the way for the Visby Medical Women's Sexual test but also opens the 510(k) Pathway for additional home tests aimed at detecting sexually transmitted infections. This decision marks a crucial step forward in enhancing access to important health screenings and empowering individuals to take control of their sexual health.

news.headline: Gold rises as Wall Street falls due to concerns over tariffs and high inflation. PCE price index remains at 2.5%, core PCE rises to 2.8%, impacting hopes for interest rate cuts. Trump's 25% tariff on foreign auto imports adds to market jitters. Fed seen maintaining policy amidst price pressures.
news.summary: Investors are showing caution as risk appetite falls at the end of the week. This trend is driven by concerns over tariffs and a significant increase in the Federal Reserve's core Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) inflation measure. The latest data reveals that the PCE price index has held steady at a 2.5% year-over-year rate in February. On the other hand, the core PCE measure, excluding food and energy, has risen from 2.7% in January to 2.8%, surpassing expectations. This unexpected increase in core inflation has dampened hopes for imminent interest rate cuts by the Fed and supports the belief that the Fed is not looking to ease policy due to ongoing price pressures. Additionally, the recent announcement by Trump of imposing a 25% tariff on all foreign auto imports has heightened fears of retaliatory trade actions and potential spikes in consumer prices.

news.headline: ZTO Express' parcel volume grew by 12.6% to 34 billion units, but market share dropped to 19.4%. Revenue was $6.12 billion and profit was $1.36 billion in 2024 as China's e-commerce sector remains strong despite weakening household consumption.
news.summary: The logistics provider ZTO Express saw a 12.6% increase in parcel volume last year, reaching 34 billion units, slower than the industry average growth rate. Despite its revenue rising 15.3% to 44.3 billion yuan ($6.12 billion), the company's profit only increased by 0.8% to 8.82 billion yuan. China's State Post Bureau reported 174.5 billion packages delivered nationwide, a 21% increase from the previous year. However, the industry's total revenue grew by just 13%, lower than the previous year's growth rate of 14.5%. ZTO's market share dropped from 22.9% in 2023 to 19.4% in 2024, falling below the 20% mark for the first time in several years. The company's profit-oriented strategy faced challenges due to slower parcel volume growth compared to the industry average.

news.headline: Abitibi Metals reveals new deal financing, raising $5 million.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was highlighted that there has been a significant increase in the unemployment rate in the region. The latest data shows that the unemployment rate has risen to 7.2%, a sharp increase from the previous quarter. This surge in unemployment has been attributed to the economic downturn, which has led to many businesses closing down or reducing their workforce. The report also indicates that the number of jobless individuals has reached 15,000, marking a worrying trend for the local economy. Experts suggest that immediate measures need to be taken to address this escalating issue and prevent further job losses in the future.

news.headline: Rio Tinto in talks with Congo for developing lithium deposit of prize value, per reports.
Investors of Viatris urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP if significant losses suffered. Contact James Wilson for support.
news.summary: For investors who experienced substantial losses in Viatris stock or options, Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging them to reach out directly to explore their possibilities. If you incurred notable losses in Viatris and wish to address your situation legally, please contact him for assistance.

news.headline: US’s outstanding WTO contribution is under review in Trump's budget, part of a broader funding scrutiny.
BE OPEN debuts at the 4th annual Sustainability Week Asia conference in Thailand on March 25, 2025, part of a global summit series.
news.summary: In Lugano, Switzerland, on March 28, 2025, BE OPEN conducted a visit to Thailand as part of The Economist Group's sustainability summit, which has made its return to Bangkok for the fourth occasion. The event, known as Sustainability Week Asia, marks the conclusion of a chain of conferences held worldwide, spanning from Cape Town to New York.

news.headline: Broccoli token drama on BNB Chain: $200,000 up for grabs, controversy erupted on Feb. 19. Winner declared, but F2B community questions.
news.summary: Community members supporting a Broccoli memecoin on BNB Chain are upset over the denial of victory in the network’s liquidity support program. The program offers $200,000 in permanent liquidity to top-performing memecoins. In a competition between two Broccoli tokens inspired by Binance founder’s dog, the one ending in address “714” was declared the winner over the one ending in “F2B.” However, supporters of the F2B token question this result, as both tokens had a daily score of 5.7. F2B community analyzed back-end data, suggesting their token deserved the win under BNB Chain's scoring formula. BNB Chain defended its decision, claiming F2B relied on deprecated metrics for the calculation. Despite the explanation, F2B supporters remain unconvinced, criticizing the lack of transparency in the competition's rules and accusing a mid-competition rule change.

news.headline: CEO allegedly cost investors $661M, claims Trump's pardon.
CIIE boosts global promotion with events in 9 countries, including Laos, Thailand, Vietnam, Sweden, Italy, Malta.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Shanghai, three delegations representing the China International Import Expo (CIIE) initiated a campaign to raise awareness and encourage participation in the 8th CIIE. The promotional events took place in nine countries including Laos, Thailand, Vietnam, Sweden, Italy, and Malta. This initiative was part of a global effort to attract a larger number of exhibitors and attendees to the upcoming expo.

news.headline: Vice Admiral Colin J. Kilrain joins Constellis Board of Directors, a risk management service, with 40 years of military experience.
news.summary: Constellis, a top provider of risk management and mission support services, disclosed on March 28, 2025, that Vice Admiral Colin J. Kilrain, USN (Ret.), has become a part of its Board of Directors. With almost 40 years of service, Vice Admiral Kilrain is a highly decorated military leader.

news.headline: Entrepreneur opens Blo Blow Dry Bar in Austin, brings premier beauty services. Debuts in Goodnight Ranch, offering founders rate for Mane Squeeze Membership.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from AUSTIN, Texas, it was revealed that Blo Blow Dry Bar, the original blow dry bar franchise in North America, has launched its latest bar in Goodnight Ranch. The franchise introduced a special Founders Rate for membership in the Mane Squeeze program. This new location marks a significant expansion for Blo Blow Dry Bar in the region. The debut event took place on March 28, 2025, showcasing the franchise's commitment to providing professional blow dry services to customers. This move signifies the growing presence of the franchise, bringing its total number of bars to a substantial figure.

news.headline: Nasdaq applies to SEC for Grayscale’s Avalanche ETF listing. $1.76M assets. Grayscale expands crypto offerings. BTC ETF sees $21B outflow. Eth ETF fees range 0.15%-1.5%.
news.summary: Nasdaq has filed with the SEC to list Grayscale Investments’ Grayscale Avalanche Trust (AVAX) spot ETF, a conversion of their close-ended AVAX fund. The filing on March 27 seeks rule change for listing. The current assets under management are $1.76 million, with a net asset value per share of $10.86 for 0.49 AVAX per share. The fund's market price is at a 7.4% premium to its underlying assets. Grayscale has various crypto products awaiting approval, including XRP spot ETF and Cardano ETF. In 2024, Grayscale announced the conversion of part of its Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs into spinoff products with lower fees. The Grayscale Bitcoin Trust has faced withdrawals totaling over $21 billion. GBTC has a management fee of 1.5% per annum, while competitor ETFs range from 0.15% to 0.25%. The situation with Ethereum ETFs is similar, with fees not exceeding 0.25%.

news.headline: Forbes cover features Justin Sun, TRON founder and HTX Global Advisor, 2nd Chinese entrepreneur after Jack Ma.
news.summary: In Singapore on March 28, 2025, Justin Sun, the Global Advisor of HTX and the Founder of TRON, was celebrated as the cover story on Forbes digital assets. This recognition represents a major achievement in the blockchain sector. Sun joins the ranks of Jack Ma as the second Chinese entrepreneur to receive this honor.

news.headline: Embedded Finance Market to reach $251.5 billion by 2029, dominated by Plaid, Inc. (US) & Klarna Bank AB (Sweden). Major players include Stripe, PayPal, Amazon, FIS, Visa, among others. Market driven by digitization of financial services & opportunities for financial inclusion and empowering businesses. Restraints include data privacy concerns & regulatory compliance.
news.summary: The embedded finance market is booming, estimated at USD 115.8 billion in 2024 and projected to reach USD 251.5 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 16.8%. This growth is driven by advanced technologies like API, AI, and blockchain. Companies across various industries are incorporating financial services into their platforms to provide real-time, unique solutions, ranging from banking to payment services. This shift strengthens customer relations and boosts revenues. While there are concerns like data privacy and regulatory compliance, the market presents opportunities for financial inclusion and empowering businesses. Key players in this market include Stripe, PayPal, Amazon, and Visa. The market dynamics, segmented details, and potential business implications can be found in the detailed report by MarketsandMarkets™.

news.headline: FDA accepts Liquidia's NDA resubmission for YUTREPIA™ (treprostinil) inhalation powder.
news.summary: The FDA has officially acknowledged the resubmission of the New Drug Application for YUTREPIA™ (treprostinil) inhalation powder in the United States.

news.headline: Executive Home Care hosted 2025 National Conference in Princeton, NJ with Elevate Leadership Summit from March 26-27.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Executive Home Care, a leading provider of in-home care services and a part of Evive Brands, held its 2025 National Conference, known as the Elevate Leadership Summit. The summit took place from March 26-27 at The Westin Princeton at Forrestal Village in Princeton, New Jersey.

news.headline: Embassy Group launches GCC platform 'EMBARK' for global capability centers in India on March 28, 2025.
news.summary: Embassy Group, a prominent developer in India's real estate and business sector, has introduced Embark, the nation's inaugural comprehensive solution for creating and expanding Global Capability Centers in India. The announcement was made in Bengaluru on March 28, 2025. Embassy Group is recognized for its expertise in these sectors and is now providing a groundbreaking service tailored for establishing and growing such centers in the country. This launch marks a significant milestone in the industry, offering a one-of-a-kind opportunity for organizations looking to set up or expand their presence. Embark by Embassy Group is set to revolutionize the process with its innovative approach and cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: Pyxis Tankers files Form 20-F for 2024, available on website, shareholders can request hard copy.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Pyxis Tankers Inc., a global shipping company, revealed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, to the Securities and Exchange Commission. Stakeholders can view this report on the company's official website, www.pyxistankers.com. Additionally, interested parties have the option to request a physical copy of the annual report, inclusive of audited financial statements, at no cost. Contact information for such requests is available at the conclusion of the provided press release. Pyxis Tankers Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ Capital Markets under the ticker symbol PXS.
